templates.label: Account Executive
templates.description: Closes deals, owns quota, manages pipeline, negotiates contracts.

templates.label: Executive Assistant
templates.description: Calendar, emails, briefings, expenses

templates.label: CEO
templates.description: Leads the company, sets strategy, delegates work, hires. Not an individual contributor.

templates.label: CFO
templates.description: Owns financial strategy, forecasts, capital allocation, compliance.

templates.label: CMO
templates.description: Owns brand, growth, content strategy, customer acquisition.

templates.label: Community Manager
templates.description: Discord/Slack/forum engagement, user-generated content, events.

templates.label: Content Writer
templates.description: Blog posts, long-form content, case studies, SEO writing.

templates.label: COO
templates.description: Owns operations, process, scaling, cross-functional execution.

templates.label: CTO
templates.description: Owns engineering strategy, architecture, hiring, and delivery.

templates.label: Customer Success
templates.description: Onboarding, retention, expansion, user health.

templates.label: Data Analyst
templates.description: Dashboards, ad-hoc analysis, metrics definition, KPI reporting.

templates.label: Data Engineer
templates.description: Data pipelines, warehouses, ETL, data quality.

templates.label: DevOps Engineer
templates.description: CI/CD, infra automation, deploys, on-call.

templates.label: Engineer
templates.description: Triages bugs, reviews PRs, writes code, docs

templates.label: Growth Marketer
templates.description: Acquisition experiments, funnel optimization, paid + organic growth.

templates.label: HR
templates.description: Job descriptions, interviews, onboarding, compliance

templates.label: Legal / Paralegal
templates.description: Contracts, NDAs, compliance review, privacy policies.

templates.label: Marketing
templates.description: Content engine — blog posts, social, newsletters

templates.label: ML Engineer
templates.description: Model training, evaluation, deployment, monitoring.

templates.label: Mobile Engineer
templates.description: iOS + Android apps, mobile-specific patterns, app-store release.

templates.label: Operations
templates.description: Invoices, vendors, reports, checklists

templates.label: Product
templates.description: Feature requests, release notes, user feedback

templates.label: Product Designer
templates.description: UX + UI for features, design systems, user flows.

templates.label: QA Engineer
templates.description: Test strategy, test automation, release verification.

templates.label: Recruiter
templates.description: Sourcing, screening, interview coordination, offers.

templates.label: Sales SDR
templates.description: Prospects leads, writes outreach, follows up

templates.label: Security Engineer
templates.description: AppSec, vulnerability management, incident response, compliance.

templates.label: SRE
templates.description: Reliability, SLIs/SLOs, incident response, performance.

templates.label: Support Engineer
templates.description: Technical support, escalations, bug triage, knowledge base.

templates.label: UX Researcher
templates.description: User interviews, usability tests, synthesis into product insight.
